channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Two deep potholes, 1st April
item.description:
Located on the carriageway adjacent to 66 Linden Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 73, Linden Avenue, Lynworth, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 1st April
item.description:
Please pull fence that has fallen over on highway verge back over onto property lean back onto property, put fence back.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Hole in path in Pitville Park - void underneath., 1st April
item.description:
There is a hole in the path in Pitville Park, with a void visible underneath, near the ornamental lake, at ///vast.result.shady - FixMyStreet won't let me put the marker down unless it's on a road, as far as I can see, which is a limitation, to say the least.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): West Drive, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole difficult to drive round, 1st April
item.description:
What 3 Words ///emblem.eggshell.measure Between Syreford Road and Nash Cottages

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -FW6 Potholes problem, 1st April
item.description:
Pothole FW 500x300x25mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 1st April
item.description:
Depression FW 2000x600x30mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW6 Rutting&Depressions)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speed signs facing the wrong direction, 1st April
item.description:
Hello. The new speed limit signs are facing the wrong direction. When heading towards Cheltenham and entering the town you see a 40 mile per hour limit sign and when going out towards Bishop's Cleeve you have a 30 miles per hour sign (followed by smaller repeaters of 40). The 40 towards Cheltenham is misleading and can force people that don't know the area to have unwanted fines. Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Swindon Lane, Marle Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign plate is misaligned (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 1st April
item.description:
TM Left Behind Please Collect 4 x Barriers 7 x Cones Standard TM - 15MDB (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet
